zh.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye是Richard De Elye和Mrs Richard De Elye的女兒，於1245年出生在英國素福爾可。她和Sir Robert de Shelton Knight至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她於1245年住在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她去世於1306年在英國諾福爾可雪登享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye是Richard De Elye和Mrs Richard De Elye的女儿，于1245年出生在英国素福爾可。她和Sir Robert de Shelton Knight至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她于1245年住在英国英格兰素福爾可。她去世于1306年在英国諾福爾可雪登享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Emich  .

variants.name: Emich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Otto.
German: from a shortened form of the personal name   Emmerich  . Compare   Amick  .

nameMeanings.name: Elye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Ells   or   Ellis  .
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by an alder or alders, Middle Low German else, or a habitational name from any of various places formed with this word.

variants.name: Els
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ewald, Wilhelm.
German: variant of   Else  .

variants.name: Ells
meanings: English (London and Kent): variant of Ellis , or a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobel
meanings: Variant spelling of   Isabel .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye was born in 1245, in Suffolk, England as the daughter of Richard De Elye and Mrs Richard De Elye. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Robert de Shelton Knight. She lived in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom in 1245. She died in 1306, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye est née en 1245, à Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de Richard De Elye et Mrs Richard De Elye. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Robert de Shelton Knight. Elle a vécu à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1245. Elle est décédée en 1306, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye wurde 1245 in Suffolk, England, als Tochter von Richard De Elye und Mrs Richard De Elye geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert de Shelton Knight mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1245 hat sie in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1306 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Shelton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye è nata il nel 1245 nel Suffolk, England come figlia di Richard De Elye e Mrs Richard De Elye. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Robert de Shelton Knight. Vissuto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1245. Morì nel 1306, nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Shelton, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクシェルトン
ja., SUFFOLK, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Brent Legh Manor, Suffolkshire, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elyeは1245年にイギリススフォルクでRichard De ElyeとMrs Richard De Elyeの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Robert de Shelton Knightとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1245年にはイギリスイギリススフォルクに住んでいた。彼女は1306年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye(은)는 1245년 영국 수폴크에서 Richard De Elye(와)과 Mrs Richard De Elye의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Robert de Shelton Knight(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1245년도에 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 살았다. 그녀는 1306년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye nasceu em 1245, em Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de Richard De Elye e Mrs Richard De Elye. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Robert de Shelton Knight. Ela viveu em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1245. Ela faleceu em 1306, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye родилась в 1245 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. Её родителей звали Richard De Elye и Mrs Richard De Elye. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir Robert de Shelton Knight. Она жила в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1245 году. Она умерла в 1306 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye nació en 1245, en Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de Richard De Elye y Mrs Richard De Elye. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Sir Robert de Shelton Knight. Vivió en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1245. Murió en 1306, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
